zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Dutton於1389年出生在英國爾哈頓時，他的父親Lord Peter Dutton22歲，母親Elizabeth Butler17歲。他於1418年4月6日與Margaret Savage, Lady Audley在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭爾被列為mayor of chester。他去世於1445年3月11日在英國爾達頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國爾諾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Dutton于1389年出生在英国爾哈頓时，他的父亲Lord Peter Dutton22岁，母亲Elizabeth Butler17岁。他于1418年4月6日与Margaret Savage, Lady Audley在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰爾被列为mayor of chester。他去世于1445年3月11日在英国爾達頓享年56岁，埋葬在英国爾諾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Dutton was born in 1389, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, his father, Lord Peter Dutton, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Butler, was 17. He married Margaret Savage, Lady Audley on 6 April 1418, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. His occupation is listed as mayor of chester in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 11 March 1445, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Norton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Dutton est né en 1389, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Peter Dutton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Butler, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Savage, Lady Audley le 6 avril 1418, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est mayor of chester à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 11 mars 1445, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Norton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Dutton 1389 in Hatton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Peter Dutton 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Butler 17. Er hat am 6. April 1418 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Savage, Lady Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als mayor of chester in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. März 1445 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Dutton, Cheshire, England und wurde in Norton, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Dutton è nato il nel 1389 nel Hatton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Peter Dutton, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Butler, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Savage, Lady Audley il 6 aprile 1418, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come mayor of chester nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 11 marzo 1445, nel Dutton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Norton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Duttonが1389年にイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父Lord Peter Duttonは22歳，母Elizabeth Butlerは17歳であった。1418年4月6日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでMargaret Savage, Lady Audleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでの職業はmayor of chesterと記録されている。彼は1445年3月11日にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで56歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアノートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Dutton(이)가 1389년 영국 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Peter Dutton(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Butler(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1418년 4월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Margaret Savage, Lady Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 mayor of chester이었다. 그는 1445년 3월 11일 영국 체실르 드턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 노르턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Warrington, Cheshire, England: Warrington, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Dutton nasceu em 1389, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Peter Dutton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Butler, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Savage, Lady Audley em 6 de abril de 1418, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como mayor of chester em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 11 de março de 1445, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Norton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Dutton родился в 1389 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Peter Dutton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Butler, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Savage, Lady Audley 6 апреля 1418 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери.  Он работал по профессии mayor of chester в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 11 марта 1445 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности нортон, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Dutton nació en 1389, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Peter Dutton, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Butler, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Margaret Savage, Lady Audley el 6 de abril de 1418, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era mayor of chester en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1445, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Norton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
